'''Bascko''' was a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] business owner in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He ran a [[Bascko's Droid Repair|droid repair shop]], and was known for being extremely hyperactive in all his dealings.

{{Char-stub}}
